items.title_zh: 真主党向黎巴嫩境内发射火箭弹，以色列空袭造成九人死亡
items.desc_en: The incidents strain a partial ceasefire agreed by Israel and the Lebanese armed group on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 这些事件使以色列和黎巴嫩武装组织周一达成的部分停火协议变得紧张。

items.title_en: SpaceX targets fixed $135 IPO roadshow price at $1.75 trillion valuation, source says
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，SpaceX 的 IPO 路演价格固定为 135 美元，估值为 1.75 万亿美元
items.desc_en: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh- biggest in the U.S. and above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.
items.desc_zh: 这一估值将使埃隆·马斯克的公司成为美国第七大公司，超过市值约为 1.6 万亿美元的特斯拉。

items.title_en: Phone signal on trains not good enough most of the time, research says
items.title_zh: 研究称火车上的电话信号大多数时候都不够好
items.desc_en: Ofcom found the major phone networks were not providing good signal on trains, and train companies were slowing down wi-fi.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 发现主要电话网络在火车上信号不佳，火车公司也降低了 Wi-Fi 速度。

items.desc_zh: 每次跑步后重写您的训练计划

items.title_zh: Basedash Semantic Layer
items.desc_en: Define metrics once. Use them everywhere.
items.desc_zh: 定义一次指标。到处使用它们。

items.title_en: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg as Putin's flagship economic forum opens
items.title_zh: 普京旗舰经济论坛开幕之际乌克兰无人机袭击圣彼得堡
items.desc_en: Several long-range drones struck oil storage facilities near the city, days before Vladimir Putin is due to address the event.
items.desc_zh: 距离弗拉基米尔·普京发表讲话的几天前，几架远程无人机袭击了该市附近的石油储存设施。

items.title_en: Carbon Voice Speed Dial
items.title_zh: Carbon Voice Speed Dial
items.desc_en: Get your whole team (humans and agents!) on speed dial
items.desc_zh: 让您的整个团队（人员和代理！）进行快速拨号

items.title_en: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland app users report outage
items.title_zh: 劳埃德银行、哈利法克斯银行和苏格兰银行应用程序用户报告服务中断
items.desc_en: Thousands of Lloyds Banking Group customers reported problems with online banking access on Wednesday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周三上午，数千名劳埃德银行集团客户报告了网上银行访问问题。

items.title_en: Meta won't track its workers' clicks - but only for half an hour at a time
items.title_zh: Meta 不会跟踪其工作人员的点击 - 但一次只能跟踪半小时
items.desc_en: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".
items.desc_zh: 根据一份内部备忘录，新的控制措施将允许员工“一次最多暂停 30 分钟”的数据收集。

items.desc_zh: AI 代理为财富 500 强级客户提供支持

items.title_en: Publishers in UK can opt out of Google AI search results
items.title_zh: 英国的出版商可以选择退出 Google AI 搜索结果
items.desc_en: The Competition and Markets Authority says it would put publishers "in a stronger position to negotiate content deals with Google".
items.desc_zh: 竞争与市场管理局表示，这将使出版商“在与谷歌谈判内容交易时处于更有利的地位”。

items.title_en: TimeTuna.com
items.title_zh: TimeTuna.com
items.desc_en: A dynamic calendar scheduler with video backgrounds
items.desc_zh: 具有视频背景的动态日历调度程序

items.title_en: Audex Trace
items.title_zh: Audex Trace
items.desc_en: Trace what Apple Music is actually playing
items.desc_zh: 跟踪 Apple Music 实际播放的内容

items.title_en: Do you find yourself aimlessly scrolling? You're not alone
items.title_zh: 您是否发现自己漫无目的地滚动？你并不孤单
items.desc_en: A Virgin Media O2 report suggests an average of 36% of time spent on phones is without a clear purpose.
items.desc_zh: Virgin Media O2 的一份报告显示，平均 36% 的人花在手机上的时间没有明确的目的。

items.title_en: US says it fired missile at Iran-bound oil tanker
items.title_zh: 美国称向前往伊朗的油轮发射导弹
items.desc_en: The US military says the vessel's engine room was hit after the crew "ignored repeated warnings".
items.desc_zh: 美国军方表示，在船员“无视反复警告”后，该船的机舱遭到袭击。

items.title_en: Microsoft testing wearable AI gadget aimed at office workers
items.title_zh: 微软测试针对上班族的可穿戴人工智能设备
items.desc_en: The company said its own workers are testing a "wearable access badge" and a desktop device.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，其员工正在测试“可穿戴访问徽章”和桌面设备。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The tech company announces its new Majorana 2 chip.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技公司宣布推出新的 Majorana 2 芯片。

items.title_en: Microsoft says new quantum chip 1,000 times more reliable than predecessor
items.title_zh: 微软称新量子芯片比前代芯片可靠 1000 倍
items.desc_en: The tech giant predicts it will have a quantum computer that can solve commercially useful problems by the end of the decade.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头预测，到本世纪末，它将拥有一台可以解决商业有用问题的量子计算机。

items.title_zh: Chloe by Close
items.desc_en: AI agent built into your CRM who works leads for you
items.desc_zh: 您的 CRM 中内置了 AI 代理，可为您提供潜在客户

items.title_en: Instagram AI chatbot tricked by hackers to give access to others' accounts
items.title_zh: Instagram AI 聊天机器人被黑客欺骗以访问他人帐户
items.desc_en: Some reports have linked the incident to recent cases of high-profile Instagram accounts being hijacked.
items.desc_zh: 一些报道将这一事件与最近高调的 Instagram 帐户被劫持的案件联系起来。

items.title_en: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
items.title_zh: “混乱”的人工智能推出如何伤害公司并让员工感到困惑
items.desc_en: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.
items.desc_zh: 一些公司向员工施加压力，要求其使用人工智能，但并未认真考虑人工智能的部署。

items.desc_en: Catch and fix usability issues automatically as you ship
items.desc_zh: 在发货时自动发现并修复可用性问题

items.title_en: OpenAI let ChatGPT aid and abet mass shooters, Florida lawsuit claims
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达州诉讼称 OpenAI 让 ChatGPT 帮助和教唆大规模枪击事件
items.desc_en: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier alleges OpenAI and boss Sam Altman built a 'web of deceit'
items.desc_zh: 佛罗里达州总检察长 James Uthmeier 指控 OpenAI 和老板 Sam Altman 构建了一个“欺骗网”

items.title_en: UK banks blocked from cyber AI tool Mythos get offer from rival OpenAI
items.title_zh: 英国银行被阻止使用网络人工智能工具 Mythos 获得竞争对手 OpenAI 的报价
items.desc_en: Nine banks have been offered access to GPT 5.5 Cyber, as fierce rival Anthropic has blocked previews of its tool.
items.desc_zh: 九家银行已获得 GPT 5.5 Cyber​​ 的访问权限，因为激烈的竞争对手 Anthropic 已阻止其工具的预览。
